g.text: From here the roles reverse: the
0x4x requests use the node's own seq space, so both directions share the
one TCP connection without ambiguity. Each request below transits the tx
queue and blocks the executor on the RPC slot until the reply is routed
the grant is a lease — it expires
if the node dies holding it
the write lands directly in the
If the coordinator goes silent mid-call
host call raises a WASM exception
the node carries on; a hung
